class.name: TestRaycastTo3D
class.brief_description: A query test that casts a ray or shape from the [QueryItem3D] to a [QueryContext3D], to check if it hits.
class.description: A query test that casts a ray or shape from the [QueryItem3D] to a [QueryContext3D], to check if it hits.

members.member: On [param true], invert the casting and start from [member context] into [QueryItem3D].
The physics layers this test will detect.
The target [QueryContext3D] that will be detected.
What collision objects will be excluded from the test. Usually the querier should be excluded.
What type of collision object this test will detect.
The actual shape used by this test.
Use a [Shape3D] instead of a raycast.
